incoming_email.subject: Double charge on invoice
incoming_email.body: I was billed twice for order #98765. Please refund the duplicate charge.

mismatched_reply.body: To reset your password, click the link below and follow the instructions. The link expires in 24 hours.

why_mismatched: Reply addresses password reset, not billing dispute.

incoming_email.subject: Need to reschedule demo to Friday
incoming_email.body: Can we move our product demo from Thursday to Friday at 10am?

mismatched_reply.body: I've confirmed your refund for order #12345. The credit will appear within 5-7 business days.

why_mismatched: Reply confirms a refund instead of rescheduling a meeting.

incoming_email.subject: Enterprise pricing for 50 seats
incoming_email.body: What is your enterprise pricing and does it include SSO?

mismatched_reply.body: I'm sorry your package is delayed. I've sent a replacement shipment expected in 3-5 business days.

why_mismatched: Reply apologizes for shipping delay instead of answering pricing.

incoming_email.subject: Export crashes on CSV
incoming_email.body: The app crashes every time I export to CSV on macOS.

mismatched_reply.body: Your Pro subscription is set to cancel on March 31. You'll retain access until then.

why_mismatched: Reply discusses subscription cancellation, not a technical bug.

incoming_email.subject: Package 2 weeks late
incoming_email.body: My order still hasn't arrived after two weeks. This is unacceptable.

mismatched_reply.body: Our Team plan for 10 users is $25/user/month on annual billing. Would you like a trial?

why_mismatched: Reply provides sales pricing instead of addressing shipping.

incoming_email.subject: Locked out of account
incoming_email.body: Too many login attempts locked me out. I need access today.

mismatched_reply.body: Dark mode for iOS is on our Q3 roadmap targeted for August release.

why_mismatched: Reply discusses feature roadmap instead of account unlock.

incoming_email.subject: Dark mode for mobile
incoming_email.body: Any plans to add dark mode to the iOS app?

mismatched_reply.body: I've unlocked your account. Please reset your password using the link sent to your email.

why_mismatched: Reply unlocks account instead of addressing feature request.

incoming_email.subject: Cancel onboarding call
incoming_email.body: Please cancel our onboarding call next Tuesday.

mismatched_reply.body: Please update to version 3.2.2 which fixes the CSV export crash on macOS 14.

why_mismatched: Reply recommends software update instead of cancelling meeting.

incoming_email.subject: Slack integration not syncing
incoming_email.body: Slack notifications stopped working three days ago.

mismatched_reply.body: We offer 40% off for verified nonprofits. Please send your 501(c)(3) letter.

why_mismatched: Reply discusses nonprofit discount instead of integration fix.

incoming_email.subject: Welcome email missing
incoming_email.body: I signed up but never got the welcome email with setup instructions.

mismatched_reply.body: I've assigned a senior manager to resolve your billing dispute within 24 hours.

why_mismatched: Reply escalates billing dispute instead of resending welcome email.
